environment: Simulation against production-equivalent runbook (not live production)
scenario_description: All database connection pool slots are exhausted. New API requests begin failing with 503 Service Unavailable. The /readyz endpoint degrades to { status: degraded }. Users experience API errors across all authenticated endpoints.

steps_executed.action: Azure Monitor alert fires: 'DB pool saturation > 95%'
Check Azure PostgreSQL metrics for connection count

steps_executed.result: 3 long-running queries identified; no automatic timeout enforced
steps_executed.gap_identified: statement_timeout not set globally in production PostgreSQL — runbook gap

steps_executed.result: Connections dropped to 12/100; API requests recovering

gaps_identified.description: PostgreSQL statement_timeout not set — prevents automatic termination of runaway queries
gaps_identified.action: Set statement_timeout = 30000 (30s) in PostgreSQL database parameters via Azure portal

gaps_identified.description: No Azure Monitor alert defined for connection count > 80% threshold
gaps_identified.action: Create Azure Monitor metric alert: active_connections > 80 of max_connections

gaps_identified.description: Runbook for DB-01 does not include pg_stat_activity query — engineer had to recall from memory
gaps_identified.action: Update INCIDENT_TABLETOP_DRILL.md runbook with explicit pg_stat_activity commands

notes: DB-01 scenario resolved within SLO window. Three runbook gaps identified and actioned. Next drill: NET-01 (network partition) — Q3 2026.
